title: Cruise
why_this_song: Cruise by Florida Georgia Line (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You make me wanna roll my windows down and cruise"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You make me wanna roll my windows down and cruise"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Baby you're a song"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You make me wanna roll my windows down and cruise
Yeah, when I first saw that bikini top on her
She's poppin' right out of the South Georgia water
Every little farm town with you
In this brand new Chevy with a lift kit
Would look a hell lot better with you up in it

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "windows" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "windows" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cruise" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "cruise" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Cruise" was released in 2012. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Cruise" foi lançada em 2012. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Cruise" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Cruise" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
